understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles simultaneously. I thought clicking between two pieces would eventually win, but I needed both pieces on goals at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Clicking a selectable piece moves it to the clicked position. MOVE actions only affect the currently selected piece, moving it one cell at a time if not blocked by walls. Switching selection requires clicking the other piece's location. Having multiple goals means all must be occupied at once.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to place all selectable pieces onto goal tiles simultaneously. I thought clicking between two pieces would eventually win, but I needed both pieces on goals at the same time.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Clicking a selectable piece moves it to the clicked position. MOVE actions only affect the currently selected piece, moving it one cell at a time if not blocked by walls. Switching selection requires clicking the other piece's location. Having multiple goals means all must be occupied at once.
